entry.title: Creating Custom BO with upload function like 'Import Supplier Invoices' App in S4hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to create a custom business object with upload function like Import Supplier Invoices App in S4Hana Cloud system.

Is it possible to create that kind of custom business object using Key User (In App) Extensibility or Developer (On Stack) Extensibility using ADT?

Or any workaround exist?

Could you please provide any idea?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Unable Transfer Deletion Flag from S4 to GTS
entry.content:
Hey all,

I created a deletion Flag in S4 for a product using T-Code MM06 and I found that the deletion flag is not transferring automatically to GTS. Can anyone help me with this scenario. 

Regards,

Aditya

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello again,

I am currently tuning in from Brussels, Belgium.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation difference must be zero before reconciling[Message 3821-8].
entry.content: where is thread

entry.title: Re: Get dynpro field value in PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.
entry.content: That's correct, dynpfields in an input/output parameter. Refer to the inline documentation of DYNP_VALUES_READ for more information.

entry.title: List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer Query
entry.content:
Hi ,

I hope someone can help me, I need to extract the List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer.
Do you have any query for me to have this data i need?

Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANFERPOSTING ERROR
entry.content:
Hello,

Go to MMSC T-Code and add stock 1060 in plant 2000 for this material. It should work.

If not, check in MB52 if You have this material on that special stock "E".

entry.title: List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer Query
entry.content:
Hi ,

I hope someone can help me, I need to extract the List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer.
Do you have any query for me to have this data i need?

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANFERPOSTING ERROR
entry.content: The mentioned t code worked thanks

entry.title: Re: Authorization Control for static actions in RAP / ABA...

entry.title: Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - The Collection
entry.content:
Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition supports professional services companies with the digital transformation of their company. With this solution we deliver real-time accounting solutions with in-depth analysis, the right functionality to plan, execute and control profitable projects, the insight to deploy the right resources to the right project at the right time, and sophisticated billing capabilities with advanced revenue recognition.

In this blog, you can find a collection of expert blog posts that relate to Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and give you some details about the end-to-end processes of this scenario.

This is a new version, of this existing blog. Due to the migration of the SAP Community, updates will be made here in the future. 

 

 1705 Update1708 Update1711 Update
1802 Update1805 Update1808 Update1811 Update
1902 Update1905 Update1908 Update1911 Update
2002 Update 2008 Update2011 Update
2102 Update2105 Update2108 Update 
2202 Update 2208 Update 
2302 Update-2308 Update 
2402 Update---

Find here more expert blogs on Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

From Stefan Walz:

  • An Introduction to Event-Based Revenue Recognition with Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Financial Accounting for customer projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 1 Real-time insights in project-based service scenario
  • Financial Accounting for customer projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 2 Enhanced activity confirmation for service industry – including intercompany margin posting
  • Financial Accounting for customer projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 3 professional service industry reporting – including margin per contributing profit center
  • Financial Accounting for service industry in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Part 4 market segment reporting based on flexible profit center hierarchies
  • Intercompany Cost Allocations in S/4HANA Cloud
  • Financial Accounting for project-based sales in S/4HANA Cloud

From Andrew Saunders:

  • Service Pricing Example in S/4HANA Cloud Professional Services

From Tobias Schmidt:

  • Non-Time Related Materials for Project Services

From Ulrich Hauke:

  • Financial Accounting for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

From Andreas Hammerschmidt:

  • Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Activity Types and Service Materials for Project Based Services and Project Billing
  • External Contingent Workforce for Customer Projects

From Nadia Razzaq:

  • New Staffing Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Projects, Resource Management 2107

From Panduranga Rao Janga:

  • Converting project working hrs to person day with embedded steampunk extensibility

From Ana Goncalves:

  • Custom Situation Handling Use Case for Professional Services: Unstaffed Resource Requests

From Sven Nachtigall:

  • Alternative entry point for professional services projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
  • The two project control possibilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Enterprise projects and professional services projects

 

Where to find out more details on the product?

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud release info
  • Best practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud here
  • Feature Scope Description here
  • What’s New here
  • Help Portal Product Page here

entry.title: Retrieving Data from SAP Business One using Node.js Middleware
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have recently started a project that aims to retrieve data from SAP business one and manipulate it using a nodejs middleware but I didn't find too much ressources to implement the middleware.

I started by learning small things about the SAP Business One platform and learned the basics of nodejs.

I wanna know if there is any resources or methods to build the middleware.

Any help please

entry.title: Re: What is the default character in LSMW for unchanged f...
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

From info on line, it says Space and 0 are the default character for unchanged text and number fields respectively.

Where are they defaulted? I'd like to replace space with "/".

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Re: Simplifying Destination Configuration with Resource Path in Action Editor
entry.content:
Hi @MikeDoyle ,

With the latest feature release, you can now add the service path during the project creation. You will see a screen like below during project creation to add the service path

entry.title: Re: International Day of Women and Girls in Science
entry.content:
Great talk! Thanks so much for initiating this and for sharing all of your insights, ladies!

I love your story with your child @noravonthenen, and I totally agree! There need to be flexibility and I am glad, we have that at SAP! 🙂

@sheenamk I like the idea of inviting girls into the companies to find out more about it. In Germany, SAP is exactly doing that! SAP is part of the Girls' Day, which is on April 24 this year.  (website is in German). I presented there my job as a Community Advocate the last years. It's a great opportunity for female pupils to come to visit SAP and get to learn different jobs. They get also a tour and can socialize with the presenters during lunch. I love this experience and I am glad to be part of it again this year.

entry.title: Re: Renaming a PDF export file
entry.content: Where in SAP can you set the system to automatically update the naming convention when exporting the document to PDF?

entry.title: Re: Build service failed community edition
entry.content: Hi same error here if you find any solution plese help me to build

entry.title: Manage Dashboards table calculations
entry.content:
Hello experts

 

I am trying to figure out how Manage Dashboards work in SAP DM and I want to add to a table the time it took for a step from a routing to be completed: 

Basically I want to do CompletedTime - StartedTime and display it in a new row in the table. 

How can I achieve this?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP CAL installation missing configuration in advance...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please select the Public Static IP Address check box in order to use this option. For more information, see our Documentation .

Which Appliance Template are you using? As it is mentioned in provided above part of our Documentation, the FQDN feature is not available for all Appliance Templates in SAP Cloud Appliance Library, so that DNS Settings is not mandatory field during Appliance creation process, it's availability depends on used by you Appliance Template.

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: FPM Save Search for special users
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

I think you mean the FPM SEARCH UIBB.
Actually there is no way to save a search view for a special group of users. 
This is only available for the LIST/TREE/ALV Views.

regards

Heike

entry.title: Automatically renaming a PDF export file
entry.content: I would like to have a PDF file automatically renamed to my preferred naming convention when exporting document to PDF.  Is there any way to set this in SAP ? Right now when you select the PDF icon it automatically saves the file with the naming convention of date and time.....no Doc number nor Doc type showing to the exported files .

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello back @LisetteM !! Perhaps you've already joined the Brussels Group? Let us know any time we can support you or in case of questions! Great to have you in SAP Community.

entry.title: Universal ID created but old content is lost for P User
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I've just generated a universal ID, but unfortunately, my previous content seems to have been lost after linking it to my P ID. The old posts I made now appear as if they were posted by the former_XXXXX member.

I've already sent an email to community@sap.com. I would greatly appreciate any assistance in retrieving my old content.

Best regards,

Mukhtar

 

SAP Universal ID

entry.title: Re: How to delete data from setup tables of 2LIS_02_SRV?
entry.content:
Use transaction LBWG:

1752439 - Explanation of transaction LBWG

entry.title: Re: Process Chain Logs: Default Date Range Display in SAP BW 7.40
entry.content: Hi, Did you get the solution for your issue?

entry.title: Post a xlsx file with custom script to s/4hana cloud in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I am right now trying to figure out how to post a xlsx file with a custom script to a preliminary billing document in the s/4hana cloud through sap build process automation. I have already looked at the call web service activity best practices and found something for a pdf, which is also working for me. But unfortunately it is not working properly for the xlsx file. I am able to attach a xlsx file there but the uploaded file is always damaged in the S/4Hana System and cannot be openend. That means I receive the 201 created as a response and also can see the file attached to the PBD but can´t open the file then out of the S/4HANA System. When I open the original file, everything works perfectly and the original file is not damaged.  


My custom script looks like the following: 

async function fetchToken() {
    const options = {          
        resolveBodyOnly : false,
        method: 'POST',
        url: 'https://myxxxxxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet',
        headers: {
            'slug': slug,
            'BusinessObjectTypeName': businessObjectTypeName,
            'LinkedSAPObjectKey': linkedSAPObjectKey,
            'Authorization': 'Basic ' + credentials,
            'x-csrf-token' : csrf_token,
                       
        },
        metadataType: irpa_core.enums.request.metadataType.formData,
        metadata:[
        {
            name:'testhochladen.xlsx',
            file: filePath,
            type: 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
        }
        ]
    };
    try {
        const response = await irpa_core.request.call(options);
        return response;  
    } catch (error) {
        const csrfToken = error.response.headers['x-csrf-token'];
        return error;
    }
}
let response = await fetchToken();
return response.body;


When I try to send the file with Postman it works perfectly and as I said a pdf is also working. I changed the type to the mimetype of an xlsx file but it is still not working. I also added the Content-Type header to also have the mimetype there once again but the result is always the same. 

Do you guys have any advice on how I could proceed or what might be my mistake?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @Katherine_K I joined, thank you!👌

entry.title: Re: datasphere intelligent lookup - error: No deployed ve...
entry.content:
Today following solution has been provided by SAP

Dear Customer,

I am happy to inform you that the fix for the issue reported in this customer case has now been implemented and is planned to be available via SAP Datasphere wave 2024.07. The fix will be available to you immediately upon RTC of the wave. Please see note 2984828 regarding the planned availability of the fix. Please ensure to refer the column indicating the availability of the content without needing activation. Also, please be advised that in the case of any changes to the planned wave availability schedule, this note will be updated in advance. Hence, kindly ensure to check the note for updates on a regular basis.

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax Reporting - Spain
entry.content:
Hi,
Modelo 115 for real estate has been added now in cloud version. Report definition - ES_WHT_M115

entry.title: Re: How to call a search help by ABAP code in dynpro module?
entry.content:
Hi,

example for a parameter in a report:

PARAMETERS: p_xxx TYPE yyyyy MATCHCODE OBJECT <search help name>.

Best regards, Katja

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: That's great news @LisetteM - maybe you can network locally with some of the group curators and others like @WouterLemaire and @geert-janklaps - happy networking!

entry.title: Re: Turning on QR Codes in SuccessFactors and enable SF M...
entry.content:
To open the QR code as a learner (the user registered in the class):

  1. Open the app >
  2. Navigate to Learning >
  3. Click the "View Registration" button of the class >
  4. Click "My QR Code".

To scan a QR code as an instructor:

  1. Open the app >
  2. Tap the three lines in the upper right-hand corner of the screen and select "Instructor" >
  3. Tap the "Past Classes" tab and access the desired class >
  4. Tap the "Edit Attendance" button under the "SCHEDULE" (not under "STUDENTS" where the record learning button is) >
  5. Tap the "Scan" button at the very top of the screen > 
  6. The QR code scanner will automatically open and start looking for a code. Once it finds it, it will automatically grab it.

entry.title: Re: How to find if maintenance plan is active or inactive...
entry.content: @ajit2804 yes you can.

entry.title: Re: List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer Query
entry.content: Check FBL5N

entry.title: Re: ME57 , Add field (Column) to item overview ALV
entry.content:
Hello,

the answer of @Jeansy is correct.

I actually modified the table control and it turned out to be an "easy" one.

Create an append to structure MEREQ3214

Add the field to the table control:

As FRGDT is a field of table EBAN the field is already populated / no extra development necessary.

Best Regards

Hendrik

entry.title: Error while posting a parked document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Hope everyone is fine.

We are facing an issue on the production server. While posting a parked document in FBV0 we are facing an error (Message No AA003 " Asset 2000000000229 0000 is being processed by user ABC" ). This error is persisting, even after closing all sessions, logging out, and attempting to re-enter. Despite these efforts, the same error is still occurring. 

We have tried to implement two notes but they were not relevant to our system i.e Note: 2086875 and Note: 1981871.

Please advice, Thanks.

entry.title: Where can I learn to perform profit center reorganization in your SAP S/4HANA system?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Managing Changes with Organizational Flexibility in SAP S/4HANA learning journeys   

Overview
This learning journey prepares you to analyze, prepare, and perform organizational changes in your SAP S/4HANA system using the available reorganization tools.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will be able to perform profit center reorganization in your SAP S/4HANA system. You will be able to explain restrictions and dependencies when implementing organizational changes and discuss the process and customizing differences between cloud and on-premise systems.

Prerequisites
Knowledge of financial organizational units, their integration, and interdependencies in SAP systems.

 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content:
Thanks.. Now i have splitted the message into dynamic and static mapping. The payload after xslt script mapping looks like this now:

<Produkt1>631-00015-00</Produkt1>
<Produkt2>661-00003-00</Produkt2>
<Produkt3>660-00000-00</Produkt3>
<Produkt4>803-130000-0001</Produkt4>

How can i now combine this payload with the payload of the static message mapping? Usage of content modifier?

Thanks for your help.

best regards

entry.title: I want to understand and explain different functionalities of SAP Fieldglass, please guide me
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Introducing SAP Fieldglass learning journeys 

 
Overview
This learning journey will guide you through an introduction of SAP Fieldglass, explaining different functionalities of the solution and how it can be used to simplify the procuring and managing of your workforce.

Learning objectives
Upon completing this course, administrators will be able to understand and explain different functionalities of SAP Fieldglass, SAP's vendor management solution that simplifies the process of procuring, managing, and optimizing flexible workforces.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: SAP- Document Splitting
entry.content: Superb !

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content:
Hello Marty,

i have now made a dynamic mapping with xslt script and one static as i have replied to Ryan. Now i just need to combine the two messages and then i would have the solution.

best regards

entry.title: Re: we cant do put away for alreday existing bin
entry.content:
Hello,

Maybe you have to check your settings in storage type. Especially in the putaway control tab. I believe putaway rules and addition stock need some configuration to let you put away in the existing bin.

entry.title: Re: Scope items 1J2 vs 5XU difference
entry.content: Hi Ernesto, thanks for your answer. That is exactly what I have found but I was hoping there is more detailed explanation of those functionalities. Because from the overview the customer doesn't really know if the scope is worth the additional licence.

entry.title: HCM Brasil: Instrução Normativa RFB Nº 2.174/2024 (Atualização da tabela de IRRF para PLR)
entry.content:
Olá pessoal,

No dia 14 de fevereiro de 2024 foi publicada a Instrução Normativa RFB Nº 2.174/2024 que altera a tabela progressiva de PLR a partir de 1º de fevereiro de 2024.

Vejam como ficaram os novos valores na tabela abaixo:

Valor do PLR anual (em R$)

Alíquota (%)

Parcela a Deduzir do Imposto (em R$)

De 0,00 a 7.640,80

Zero

Zero

De 7.640,81 a 9.922,28

7,5

573,06

De 9.922,29 a 13.167,00

15

1.317,23

De 13.167,01 a 16.380,38

22,5

2.304,76

Acima de 16.380,38

27,5

3.123,78

Para se adequar a essa alteração na legislação, a SAP já realizou a entrega através da SAP Note 3434973 - Normative Instruction 2.174/2024 - Update the new IRRF ranges of PLR table.

A entrega consiste em atualização da Tabela de IRRF (T7BRTX) conforme os novos valores para PLR.

 

Pré-requisitos

Você instalou o Support Package mínimo, conforme descrito no blog post HCM Brasil: pré-requisitos de Support Package para implementação de SAP Notes.

Você instalou a SAP Note 3434973 - Normative Instruction 2.174/2024 - Update the new IRRF ranges of PLR table.

 

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.

Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este Blog post no espaço abaixo. E não esqueçam de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para ficarem ligados nas últimas notícias.

Um abraço,

Natássia Terribele
Time de HCM Brasil

entry.title: Delivery of Legal Forms for the UK using My Fiori Forms App.
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Fiori is a design system that enables the creation of business apps with a consumer-grade user experience with simple screens that run on any device.

SAP Fiori provides an easier, more intuitive way to run SAP applications in your organisation. With a focus on an intelligent, consistent, and integrated user experience SAP Fiori can help you redefine the way you work in the age of digital transformation.

More information is available here: SAP Fiori | User Experience and Apps

SAPs localisation team for the UK is pleased to announce the delivery of additional UK specific legal forms using Fiori 2.0 My Forms app. This new functionality will allow employees more flexible access to their forms dependent on your company security and network policies.

The following forms are now enabled for the UK:

  • P11D – Expenses and Benefits
  • P60 – End of Year Certificate
  • BSS - Benefit Summary Statement

Please see note 3401344 - HRGB - My Forms (Fiori 2.0) - P60/P11D/BSS forms display for more information.

 

Using the My Fiori Forms App

You can access the forms using the My Forms Fiori App via your desktop or mobile device:

 

 

Please see 3251036 - My Forms (Fiori 2.0): Content for SAP HCM Local Versions for other country localisations delivered by SAP.

For more information, please see the relevant documentation for My Forms:

Help SAP

SAP Reference Library

 

Integrating the My Fiori Forms app with SuccessFactors

 The My Fiori Forms app can also be integrated into SuccessFactors using two options:

  • A link on the Payroll Information tab
  • A custom card on the Homepage

Integration to the Payroll Information Tab

It is possible to add a link within the Payroll Information tab in Employee Central to permit users access to the forms configured in My Fiori Form app.

The Payroll Information tab is where the user would access other payroll related information including Tax and National Insurance data held in Infotypes in Employee Central Payroll (ECP) as well as their pay statement.

Please see Using My Forms (Fiori 2.0) | SAP Help Portal for details on how to add links to this tab.

Launching Fiori Forms from a custom card on the Homepage

Using the Custom Card functionality it is possible to add a new card to the Homepage within Employee Central that will launch the URL connecting the user to the forms delivered via the My Fiori Forms app.

For further information on how to configure this please  see Creating or Editing Custom Cards for the Home Page | SAP Help Portal

 

When configuring the Custom Card you can also specify whether the card should be shown within the SuccessFactors mobile app. If you switch this on then the new card will appear on the homepage within the mobile app and permit the user to launch the URL to connect to the My Fiori Forms apps.

 

 

System Landscape Requirements

Customers must be on release 608 and in order to be able to implement this app, your system landscape has to be enabled for SAP Fiori. One of the requirements for your system landscape is that your back-end product meets the required product version stack:

Required Back-End Product (Product Version Stack)

SAP Fiori 2.0 for SAP ERP HCM (17 (03/2022))

 

The front-end components of this app (such as the user interface) are delivered together with the components of other apps as part of this SAP Fiori product:

Front-End Components Delivered with (Product Version Stack)

SAP Fiori 2.0 for SAP ERP HCM ( 17 (03/2022) )

 

For more information, see the app implementation document of this app. SAP Fiori 2.0 for SAP ERP HCM | SAP Help Portal

 

Summary

The delivery of UK Legal forms using the My Forms Fiori app provides customers and their employees with flexible access to their P60’s, P11d’s and Benefit Summary Statement from their chosen device (dependent on your company security/network policies).

Please see note 3401344 - HRGB - My Forms (Fiori 2.0) - P60/P11D/BSS forms display for more information.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: Work Instruction error. 403 Forbidden SSL required.
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,
Hope you are doing good. Thank you for your reply. 
According to your last message I tracked the URL, that was being generated and found the issue. 
The issue is related to the port number. Do you know how can I change the Port number in the URL that was created from S4. 

Please let me know how can I proceed further. Thank you in advance. 

KR,
Sayuj.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Bangalore 2024: FEDML Reference Architecture for Hyperscalers and SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hey Folks, it's Navya again!

Well, as a fellow SAP enthusiast, I know how thrilling it is to dive into the world of SAP learning about the different SAP technologies, collaborating and networking with people and much more. 

Sindhu Gangadharan, SVP & MD SAP Labs IndiaAmongst this, starting this year with our first edition of SAP Inside Track Bangalore 2024, the excitement is palpable, and I'm thrilled to be a part of it. But what makes this event even more special is the opportunity to share my experience and delivering a session in it. So, as we embark on this inaugural journey, let me weave you through the highs, lows, and invaluable lessons learned along the way.

SAP Inside Track events are all about grassroots collaboration and sharing expertise on SAP-related topics.The day kicked off with keynote address by Sindhu Gangadharan, SVP & MD, SAP Labs India and Head User Enablement with her insightful thoughts shedding light on the SAP eco-system and setting the tone for the day, inspiring attendees to engage actively, learn from one another, and leverage their collective expertise to drive innovation and success in the realm of SAP technology.

This year's SIT focused on eight tracks, each offering a wide array of topics spanning SAP Business Technology Platform(BTP), Application Development, Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence & Automation, UI/UX Design, SAP Concur, and S/4 HANA.

Session on FedML with Hyperscaler & SAP Datasphere [In frame speakers: Navya and Lalit]Amidst the diverse array of topics, I had the privilege of presenting the session on "Federated Machine Learning Reference Architecture for Hyperscalers and SAP Datasphere" with my colleague a.ka. mentor @lalitmohan . It was an exhilarating experience to share insights and delve into the intricacies with fellow enthusiasts.

Session on Federated Machine Learning Reference Architecture for Hyperscalers and SAP Datasphere

During the session, we delve to an in-depth exploration of federated machine learning libraries, that applies the Data Federation Architecture of SAP Datasphere for intelligently sourcing SAP as well as non-SAP data for Machine Learning experiments, allowing for model training across distributed data sources while preserving data privacy and security. This innovative architecture enables hyperscalers and organizations leveraging SAP DataSphere to harness the power of machine learning at scale without compromising sensitive data.

But before getting into the usecase front, let us discuss What is FedML? Why FedML?

What is FedML?

Federated Machine Learning is an approach to machine learning where the training data remains distributed over multiple devices or locations, without centrally aggregating it. Instead of bringing all the data to one location, federated learning brings the model to the data or distributes the model across multiple devices or servers. This approach allows for privacy-preserving machine learning, as the raw data remains local and is not shared with a central server or authority.

Why FedML?

  • Data Federation Architecture: FedML leverages SAP Datasphere's Data Federation architecture to intelligently source both SAP and non-SAP data for machine learning experiments.
  • Integration with Hyperscalers: FedML seamlessly integrates with hyperscaler platforms, providing compatibility and scalability for machine learning processes.
  • Abstraction of Data Connection and Load: FedML abstracts the complexities of data connection and loading, simplifying the process of accessing and utilizing data from various sources.
  • Flexible Model Training: FedML offers flexibility in model training by providing support for user-provided training scripts.
  • End-to-End Integration & Minimal Code Requirement: FedML facilitates end-to-end integration of the machine learning pipeline, covering data connection, data loading, model training, deployment, and inferencing stages.

Reference Architecture

After familiarizing ourselves with the fundamentals of integrating FedML with SAP Datasphere, we proceeded to explore two specific use cases:

  • Implementing Databricks FedML with SAP Datasphere

Business Challenge: Large-scale distributed data is crucial for analytics and decision-making. Much of this data is used for predictive modeling and machine learning (ML). With the proliferation of ML platforms, businesses can now efficiently train and deploy models. However, accessing SAP data presents challenges for Data Scientists using Databricks. They depend on data engineers to create pipelines for SAP data extraction and preparation, which is costly and time-consuming. Integrating non-SAP data with SAP data for ML experimentation adds complexity.

Proposed Solution: In order to try out the solution for this scenerio, you can refer to the Github Repo or refer to this amazing blogpost 

  • Integrating GCP FedML with SAP Datasphere

Business Challenge: In enterprises, for conducting machine learning experiments on hyperscaler platforms, the data often has to be extracted out of source business systems and duplicated in cloud stores of the ML platform. This causes issues such as data inconsistencies and increased TCO resulting from additional data storage costs due to data duplication and expensive data pipelines. Moreover, comparative sales performance analysis on live data is not currently possible with data from cross cloud sources.

Proposed Solution: In order to try out the solution for this scenerio, you can refer to the DC Mission, Github Repo or refer to this amazing blogpost 

In case you want to try out any other Hyperscalar scenerio with FedML and SAP Datasphere, you can refer to the following DC Mission: AWS FedML with Datasphere, Azure FedML with SAP Datasphere

Following our demo on the above scenarios, we concluded with a Q&A session to address any queries, concerns, or feedback from the audience. During the Q&A, participants had the opportunity to delve deeper into the intricacies of federated machine learning and its applications in various industries. 

Conclusion

So there you have it – my whirlwind adventure at SAP Inside Track 24. I am grateful for the opportunity to share my expertise, connect with fellow enthusiasts, and be part of this incredible community-driven event. As I reflect on this experience, I am inspired to continue pushing the boundaries of innovation and making meaningful contributions to the SAP ecosystem. 

SAP Inside Track'24 Team

entry.title: New Asynchronous Export to Spreadsheet Feature for the Multidimensional Data Grid Apps
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

In 2021, the Web Dynpro Multidimensional Data Grid App replaced the SAP Design Studio app as default reporting tool for drill-down reporting in SAP S/4HANA.


Initially designed for human interaction, this web application offers an export feature that has been continuously improved and streamlined over time:

  • Export of PDF files
  • Streamlining of export to improve performance
  • Google workspace integration with the possibility to export spreadsheets to Google directly
  • etc.

However, there always was the possibility that the amount of data cells simply was too large, and the system would run out of memory, or into a timeout. SAP Note 2547776 introduced a popup message that warned a user of these risks in case more than 100.000 cells would be exported.

Now the next step in terms of performance optimization has been taken by offering to export large amounts of data in a background task. Furthermore, the user can trigger the export in the background (see Figure 1), and continue working in the application without having to wait until the export has finished, with or without the application still alive and running.

Figure 1: “Export to Spreadsheet” popup with a new function to trigger the export in the background.

 

Once the background task has finished, if the application that has triggered it is still running, the user is informed of the success (or failure) of the export. The exported file is then available for download for the next 72 hours. Expired files will be deleted automatically from the database table.

The files can be accessed either in a new tab “Downloads” (e.g. in the generic FPM_BICS_OVP apps), or in a dialog window that can be accessed via the download button choice for applications that do not offer the new tab directly (see Figure 2). In both cases, the same component is used, and the layout is the same.

Figure 2: List of downloads to monitor the status and access the result of the asynchronous exports.

In the list of downloads in this example, the first file “export.xlsx” already has been exported successfully, while the second file “demo_export” is currently being exported. Download is possible only for successfully exported files, while deletion is possible also for entries where the export has failed or is currently in progress. However, deleting an unfinished export does not abort the background process.

During a single user session, only one background export can be executed at any given time. If you start an export in background while there is still another process running, the new process will not be started, and an error message will be displayed.

It should be noted that this does not mean that unlimited amounts of data can be exported from the grid now. There are still scenarios where the amount of data required to export a file is outside the boundaries of memory allocation for a work process. This depends not only on the number of cells in the grid, but also on their (conditional) formatting and merging, variables, and filters, down to the definition of the query and the used database tables. Even the database technology may have an influence on how much data can be processed at once.

The feature will be contained in the 2408 updates of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP BW/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and it is available with SAP Note 3427386 for SAP_BW 757 and 758, and SAP Note 3434831 for BW/4HANA 400.

With this new feature, you can more easily export data from a Multidimensional Data Grid Apps without blocking the application and reduce the risk of running into error situations.

entry.title: Re: we cant do put away for alreday existing bin
entry.content:
Hello,

You have to check in storage type configuration, especially in the putaway control tab. In putaway rules and addition. I believe you should set the putaway rule as 2. Addition stock forbidden as 'blank'. This will let you put away in a same existing storage bin. I also recommend you have to check the capacity bin, if you maintain this.

entry.title: Medios Magnéticos — plazos de envios 2024
entry.content:
¡Hola a todos! 
Nuestra entrada de blog de hoy se refiere a los plazos para enviar archivos a la DIAN. El anuncio de los plazos se hizo en la resolución 1255 DE 2022, que comprende el año gravable de 2023. 

 

Fechas 


Mira los plazos para reportar los plazos para reportar los medios magnéticos en 2024: 

GRANDES CONTRIBUYENTES 

ÚLTIMO DÍGITO

FECHA

1

23 de Abril de 2024

2

24 de Abril de 2024

3

25 de Abril de 2024

4

26 de Abril de 2024

5

29 de Abril de 2024

6

30 de Abril de 2024

7

02 de Mayo de 2024

8

03 de Mayo de 2024

9

06 de Mayo de 2024

0

07 de Mayo de 2024


 PERSONAS JURÍDICAS Y NATURALES 

ÚLTIMOS DÍGITOS

FECHA

01 a 05

08 de Mayo de 2024

06 a 10

09 de Mayo de 2024

11 a 15

10 de Mayo de 2024

16 a 20

14 de Mayo de 2024

21 a 25

15 de Mayo de 2024

26 a 30

16 de Mayo de 2024

31 a 35

17 de Mayo de 2024

36 a 40

20 de Mayo de 2024

41 a 45

21 de Mayo de 2024

46 a 50

22 de Mayo de 2024

51 a 55

23 de Mayo de 2024

56 a 60

24 de Mayo de 2024

61 a 65

27 de Mayo de 2024

66 a 70

28 de Mayo de 2024

71 a 75

29 de Mayo de 2024

76 a 80

30 de Mayo de 2024

81 a 85

31 de Mayo de 2024

86 a 90

04 de Junio de 2024

 91 a 95

05 de Junio de 2024

96 a 00

06 de Junio de 2024

 

Para obtener más detalles, mira los canales de la DIAN:

Sitio web: https://www.dian.gov.co/ | Twitter: @DIANColombia | LinkedIn: diancolombia

 

Documentación del producto




  • Documentación de producto para medios magnéticos en Colombia.



  • La FAQ sobre los informes de los medios magnéticos.



Cómo obtener soporte


Si necesita soporte de SAP, notifique un incidente en SAP Support Portal, en el componente FI-LOC-FI-CO, que es el componente específico para temas de informes financieros para Colombia.



¿Tiene alguna pregunta? Por favor, deje un comentario.


Hasta luego,

Manuela

entry.title: Re: Error while posting a parked document
entry.content:
Terminate user  ABC with help of Basis team and unlock tables. or try with logout  ABC user.

Regards

entry.title: MySQL 8.0 CMS DB with SSL Certificate (Linux)
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to install SAP BO 4.3 on Linux (RHEL 9) with a MySQL 8.0 DB which requieres SSL Certificates. With the mysqlclient iam able to connect to the Database using a Config File at /etc/my.cnf

When iam trying to install SAP BO then iam getting this Error:

Error
An error has occurred.

SAP BusinessObjects BI platform CMS: Unable to connect to the CMS system database ""sap-bo-dev-repo:11.22.33.44:3306"". Reason: Access denied
for user 'bo-dev-repo-user'@'11.22.33.44' (using password: YES) (FWB 00090)

The system cannot verify the database logon information.
Would you like to correct it?

Does anybody know if SAP BO is using the mysqlclient? If yes where i can set a Config File to set the SSL Certificates?

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content: I think Ryan was suggesting to map the entire payload using XSLT. But if you have mapped the records to have a maximum of 4 Produkts per records so the visual mapping won't fail, you can use the graphical mapping after the xslt step. Each record should be bound 1...4 from a product perspective right? Thanks, Marty

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content: The incoming message contains too many values to map them in a simple xslt script. The point is that the amount of the products can vary. The script is working quite good, i just need to put the payload in to the payload which will be created after the static mapping which is processed in a different route.

entry.title: bulk items and subcontracting PO
entry.content:
GOOD DAY EXPECTS

Need assistance please, been struggling to issue bulk items on subcontracting PO's, mainly because the bulk tick is in the MM and not the BOM, we do not want to remove the bulk tick from mm but also want to be able to issue this items to vendor. how do we handle this without issuing to a cost center?

 

also is there a report I can run to see this bulk items that are linked to subcontracting orders?

thanking you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Report header and extended attribute
entry.content:
Hi Alexandre,

now I see what you mean. And I am afraid, that you are able to insert only those values available under the Insert button. See screenshot header.png. However, the cardinality between ext.attribute on Entity and header on Model still doesn`t match. One model (=one value) vs. many entities (=many values of your extended attribute). You would still need to transform it for example into the extended attribute of a Model. And for Model, you have Name and Code values, which can be inserted into the header. So if you don`t mind sacrifying Model Name or Model Code to your purpose, you can do it. In PD, you can display only Names or Codes at one time, but not both. The only exception is Model properties dialog, but I suppose it is almost not used. Or very little, during the model creation mainly. So here is your hack.

HTH,

Ondrej Divis

P.S. It is very unlucky, that you cannot reply directly to specific aswer, if you need to attach a screenshot in this new forum... SAP should work on this soon.

entry.title: Re: SAP Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA 2022 - Highlights
entry.content:
Hello, 

It seems the scenarios below are not yet supported. 

  • Stock Transport Orders are not yet supported for scenarios with EWM.
  • Stock Transport Scheduling Agreements  are not yet supported.
  • The returns process for Stock Transport Order and Stock Transport Scheduling Agreements is not yet supported

Is there a plan to extend the functionality to include these scenarios?

Regards

Matt

entry.title: Re: How to use Cloud SDK OpenAPI Client with CAP?
entry.content:
The issue has been resolved with the following output directory:

<outputDirectory>${project.basedir}/src/gen/java</outputDirectory>

Thanks and regards

Sathya

entry.title: Re: EXIT_SAPLL03T_002 - value cannot change in LTAP table
entry.content:
This FM is executed in update task AFTER standard update of data, so not suitable for your requireent.

(This FM is suitable to update your own tables after standard update)

Please check and provide the solution.

Regards

Silver

entry.title: API for materialdocuments with movementtype 309 with warehouse management S4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, we have to create mass material documents to book material to material (movement typ 309), in MM or directly in the warehouse. We are using public cloud with embedded warehouse management.

 

For MM there is the API material document create - but the delivery document is not created in the WHS.

If I try API warehouse task create direct in WHS - there is no API where I can create the corresponding delivery and the warehouse tasks.

Also I could not find an CDS view I can use to select the deliveries created from MM in WHS. Has somebody experience with this topic?

entry.content:

Can you try to maintain the text in BOM transaction (CS02)?. Try to maintain in status/long text item level.

entry.title: Re: Technical User Date & Time format Settings Change in C4C

I am getting authorization error. Is there a way to assign the admin rights to access and edit the Settings to the technical user?

Error

 

Thank you

Regards

Pratyush SINHA

entry.title: Re: CDS view - remove entries based on duplicates
entry.content:
Hello Sankar,

I understand that you need to remove adjancent duplicates from your data.

For acheiving this there is ROW_NUMBER() function in SQL. attaching code for reference.

output table = 

select
             client as client ,
             bukrs AS bukrs,
             ANLN1  AS ANLN1,
             ANLN2  AS ANLN2,
             AFABE as AFABE,
             BZDAT as BZDAT,
             row_number ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY client, BUKRS, ANLN1, ANLN2, AFABE
                                 ORDER BY BZDAT ASC ) AS rank_asc
             from faav_anep;

        select
            client as client ,
            bukrs AS bukrs,
            ANLN1  AS ANLN1,
          ANLN2  AS ANLN2,
           AFABE as AFABE,
          BZDAT as FDT
           from :output_table
             WHERE rank_asc = 1 ;

entry.title: Re: Bloqueio de inserção em Subtipo de problemas (OPST) -...
entry.content:
Olá, Vinicius.

Realmente, não há um objeto específico para os subtipos, portanto, não há como interagir com essa tabela diretamente.

Talvez, usando a OSCL (obj: 191), você consiga bloquear a criação ou atualização de chamados que estejam fora de um range de subtipos. EX: A empresa trabalha com os subtipos de 1 a 3. Se um quarto for adicionado, o usuário não conseguirá finalizar a transação de adição/update do chamado. Para deixar essa regra mais consistente, você poderia ainda especificar na Transaction quais os subtipos válidos, a fim de evitar que o usuário altere o nome ou descrição dos subtipos pré-determinados pela empresa.

Espero que faça sentido.

Felipe

entry.title: Re: purchasing groups material vs vendor
entry.content: thanks

entry.title: Re: purchasing groups material vs vendor
entry.content: thanks

entry.title: CPQ usage on BTP solution
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer has CPQ integrated with SAP BTP. They have CPEA contract.

I believe the CPQ might be consume their CPEA credit it depending how they setting up?

If yes, is there anyway we can track or check from CPQ side? Example: the messages sending out to BTP or other SAP solution... any tools in CPQ we can monitoring? 

Kind Regards

Helinna

entry.title: Annual Sales listing Belgium no results
entry.content:
When running statutory reporting- BE Annual Sales list the following error appears:

No data found for reporting from the query BE_SL_ANNUAL_REP_CA_QRY for the period.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Annual Sales listing Belgium no results
entry.content:
Please note, that the Message displayed in the log - "No data found for reporting from the query BE_SL_ANNUAL_REP_CA_QRY for the period" - is an information message to provide details of:

1. Data not stored for Reported Item Log Table ( Used for Audit Purpose )

2. Also Provides detailed info on what is the impact and where to check( In this case it is Admin )

 

If you think the message is more technical than business terms, please raise change request via https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2260
